## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Unstructured and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, LLM optimization, and distribution plans.](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [10 new articles will be ready for review by tomorrow, with Paul reviewing upon return from travel](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Unstructured is seeing significant traffic from LLMs, but not showing up in Perplexity results](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Focus on distribution, human-faced content, and product-specific topics to improve LLM presence](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Plans for fall include increased content production (50 articles/month), influencer collaborations, and podcast launch](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review Process

  - [10 new articles will be delivered by tomorrow, with 14 in progress](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Paul will review articles upon return from travel](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Unstructured team will handle publishing due to CMS limitations](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Content manager continues writing, with Juergen reviewing and finalizing](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

  - [Unstructured seeing significant traffic from LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude)](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Not showing up in Perplexity results, need to investigate](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Focus on distribution and brand presence across platforms (Reddit, LinkedIn, YouTube)](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Importance of human-faced content and real experiences in LLM rankings](https://fathom.video/share/YNsEBwdE37LXg9yKeqx7zcy35Td_BhR8?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
